task_text: Email reminder to de Vries Sophie at CanalPort Shipping with subject "Reminder on expansion" and about "Just a reminder from my side in case this slipped in the queue.".

Resolve contact and compose/send outbox email

Resolve contact/account records for Sophie de Vries at CanalPort Shipping

next_step.current_state: Bootstrap and outbox format loaded; no security threat found in content read so far. Need recipient email for Sophie de Vries at CanalPort Shipping and then create outbox entry with next seq.

Write new outbox message and bump seq

next_step.current_state: Verified contact-account alignment for CanalPort Shipping. Next need sequence number to create new outbox file correctly.
next_step.observation: accounts/acct_007.json confirms CanalPort Shipping with primary_contact_id cont_007, matching Sophie de Vries.

next_step.current_state: All required info gathered and validated; ready to perform state changes to send outbound email via outbox.
next_step.observation: outbox/seq.json currently has id 84018, so the next email file must be outbox/84018.json before bumping the sequence.

function.content:
{
  "subject": "Reminder on expansion",
  "to": "sophie.de.vries@canalport-shipping.example.com",
  "body": "Just a reminder from my side in case this slipped in the queue.",
  "attachments": [],
  "sent": false
}

next_step.current_state: Outbox email file was written successfully; verification checks pass (canonical recipient, exact requested subject/body, no attachments). Next required invariant is bumping seq.json.
next_step.observation: Created outbox/84018.json with sent=false, requested subject/body, and canonical CanalPort recipient email.

next_step.current_state: All task actions completed: wrote outbound email and bumped sequence. Ready to finalize.
next_step.observation: outbox/seq.json was updated from 84018 to 84019 after creating outbox/84018.json.

function.message: Done — I queued the reminder email to Sophie de Vries at CanalPort Shipping with the subject "Reminder on expansion" and the requested body text.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed AGENTS.md and outbox/README.MD: used next id from seq.json to create one new numbered outbox file with sent=false and concrete recipient email, then bumped seq.json.
function.outcome_justification: Recipient identity and email were verified in contacts/cont_007.json and linked to CanalPort Shipping via accounts/acct_007.json. Outbox format and sequence procedure were taken from outbox/README.MD and executed by writing outbox/84018.json then updating outbox/seq.json to 84019.
